headline: ICE Mortgage Monitor: Q4 Lending Climbs to 3.5-Year High as Refinance Activity Accelerates and Servicer Retention Strengthens
summary: ATLANTA & NEW YORK, March 09, 2026--Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE: ICE), one of the world's leading providers of financial market technology and data powering global capital markets, today released its March 2026 ICE Mortgage Monitor Report. According to the analysis, total mortgage originations reached an estimated 1.44 million in the fourth quarter — the largest quarterly tally since Q3 2022 — as a surge in refinance activity drove lending to its highest level in three and a half years

raw.headline: ICE Mortgage Monitor: Q4 Lending Climbs to 3.5-Year High as Refinance Activity Accelerates and Servicer Retention Strengthens
raw.summary: ATLANTA & NEW YORK, March 09, 2026--Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE: ICE), one of the world's leading providers of financial market technology and data powering global capital markets, today released its March 2026 ICE Mortgage Monitor Report. According to the analysis, total mortgage originations reached an estimated 1.44 million in the fourth quarter — the largest quarterly tally since Q3 2022 — as a surge in refinance activity drove lending to its highest level in three and a half years

headline: Intercontinental Exchange OKX Deal Extends Crypto Reach And Raises Valuation Questions
summary: Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE:ICE) has taken an equity stake in global crypto exchange OKX and agreed to a broad partnership focused on digital assets and tokenized securities. The deal includes a board seat for ICE, data and technology integration, and plans to develop regulated crypto futures and tokenized equity products. The move links ICE’s regulated market infrastructure with OKX’s global crypto user base, with the aim of connecting traditional markets with blockchain based...
